overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from a cyberpunk city at night. The clip opens with an aerial drone ascent over a circular plaza revealing a giant holographic fish swimming between neon skyscrapers, then cuts to a stationary elevated view of a busy street with palm trees and color-changing neon facades.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view of a circular plaza at night, surrounded by a ring road with moving vehicles. As the drone ascends, a massive holographic fish materializes in the sky above, swimming gracefully between the neon-lit glass skyscrapers that dominate the cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking neon-lit commercial street with palm trees

events.description: neon lights on the building facade shift from purple to green
neon lights cycle through yellow and red color patterns
multiple futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection below

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of street traffic and the color-changing neon cityscape from an elevated walkway

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the neon-lit street below the overpass

tall palm trees lining the median of the multi-lane street
commercial building with horizontal neon strips that cycle through multiple colors
large screen displaying animated video content on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to a stationary elevated view from a pedestrian bridge overlooking a busy cyberpunk street. Palm trees line the road while futuristic vehicles drive below. Across the street, a commercial building features prominent horizontal neon strips that continuously cycle through purple, green, yellow, and red colors, creating a dynamic light show against the night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a wide aerial view of a city plaza before settling into a detailed overlook of a vibrant cyberpunk street. It begins with a drone rising above a circular plaza and its surrounding ring road, where a massive holographic fish materializes to swim between towering neon-lit skyscrapers. As the perspective shifts, the camera transitions from the open sky to a stationary elevated position on a pedestrian bridge. The scene then opens onto a busy thoroughfare lined with palm trees and futuristic vehicles, focusing on a commercial building across the street. Finally, the view lingers on the building's horizontal neon strips as they continuously cycle through purple, green, yellow, and red light.
